CustomField.formula: Speaker_Accomodation_Actual__c + Speaker_Airfare_Actual__c + Speaker_Honorarium_Actual__c + Participation_Fee_Actual__c + Booth_Construction_Actual__c + Venue_Rental_Actual__c + Equipment_Rental_Actual__c + Workshop_Demo_Materials_Actual__c + Promo_Materials_Actual__c + Travelling_Accommodation_Actual__c + Cost_Others_Actual__c
CustomField.label: Total Actual Cost
